title: Global Footprint: DeHub Expands Middle East Presence via Dubai Event
html:
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 font-exo">A Landmark Quarter for DeHub in the Middle East</h2> <p class="mb-4 text-lg text-royal-blue/80">Hard work and innovation deserve to be recognized. We were incredibly honored in Q2 2024 when DeHub achieved a significant external milestone, expanding our global footprint into the Middle East with a strong presence at multiple key events in Dubai.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Our team was on the ground, connecting with industry leaders, showcasing our technology, and forging new partnerships. This expansion represents a major step in our mission to build a decentralized future, and we were thrilled by the incredible reception we received.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">DeHub's Dubai Event Schedule</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Our tour of Dubai was packed with premier blockchain and web3 conferences. Here's where you could find us:</p> <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-3 my-4 text-royal-blue/80 pl-4"> <li><strong>April 16:</strong> Blockchain Life</li> <li><strong>April 17:</strong> Global Blockchain Show</li> <li><strong>April 19:</strong> Token2049</li> <li><strong>April 21:</strong> ETH Dubai</li> <li><strong>April 22:</strong> World Blockchain Summit</li> <li><strong>April 26:</strong> 13th Global Blockchain Congress</li> <li><strong>April 29:</strong> Web 3 Dubai</li> </ul>

<p class="mt-8 font-semibold text-royal-blue">This was more than just a trip; it was a statement. DeHub is a global project, and our presence in Dubai has solidified our position in one of the world's most dynamic tech hubs. Thank you to everyone who connected with us. The future is bright, and we're just getting started!</p>
md:
A Landmark Quarter for DeHub in the Middle East

Hard work and innovation deserve to be recognized. We were incredibly honored in Q2 2024 when DeHub achieved a significant external milestone, expanding our global footprint into the Middle East with a strong presence at multiple key events in Dubai.

Our team was on the ground, connecting with industry leaders, showcasing our technology, and forging new partnerships. This expansion represents a major step in our mission to build a decentralized future, and we were thrilled by the incredible reception we received.

DeHub's Dubai Event Schedule

Our tour of Dubai was packed with premier blockchain and web3 conferences. Here's where you could find us:

  • April 16: Blockchain Life
  • April 17: Global Blockchain Show
  • April 19: Token2049
  • April 21: ETH Dubai
  • April 22: World Blockchain Summit
  • April 26: 13th Global Blockchain Congress
  • April 29: Web 3 Dubai

This was more than just a trip; it was a statement. DeHub is a global project, and our presence in Dubai has solidified our position in one of the world's most dynamic tech hubs. Thank you to everyone who connected with us. The future is bright, and we're just getting started!
